title: DETERMINATION OF COPPER IN COUNTRY SPIRITS
author: H. D. SURI
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A method has been worked out for the estimation of copper in country spirits by use of the reagent diethyl dithiocarbamate, which has been found useful specially in cases where the percentage of copper or the quantity of spirit submitted for  test  is very small.
steps_raw: A method has been worked out for the estimation of copper in country spirits by use of the reagent diethyl dithiocarbamate, which has been found useful specially in cases where the percentage of copper or the quantity of spirit submitted for  test  is very small.
